codeReview.summary: All three blocking issues from prior review remain unfixed. Year counts are identical for all years due to missing year filter in get_question_count() calls. Practice/exam modes ignore URL id parameter - all filtered PYQs load regardless of id. Mock subjects/topics remain hardcoded and bookmarks are not persisted.

issues.description: get_available_years endpoint: get_question_count() is called without year filter in the loop, causing all years to have identical counts. The comment acknowledges this: 'This is a simplification - in reality we'd want a specific count for PYQs per year' but no fix was implemented.

get_pyqs endpoint: When year filter is provided, get_question_count() is called without the year parameter: `total = await service.get_question_count(subject_id=subject_id, difficulty=difficulty,)`. The exam_year filter is not passed, causing incorrect pagination totals.
Service layer: get_question_count() does not accept an exam_year parameter, so even if the router tried to pass it, it would fail. The repository method also lacks year filtering capability.

URL id parameter (pyqId) is extracted from params but never passed to fetchPYQs(). The useEffect has empty dependency array so pyqId changes don't trigger refetch. API call fetches all filtered PYQs regardless of which specific question was selected in the URL.
Same issue as practice mode: URL id parameter is not passed to the API call. The pyqId is only used to find the starting question in the already-fetched list.
MOCK_SUBJECTS is hardcoded with 4 subjects. The comment 'Mock subjects for now - in production these would come from API' confirms this was a known limitation that was not addressed.
Topic filter has hardcoded option values (1, 2, 3, 4) instead of dynamically fetched from API based on selected subject.

Bookmarks are stored in local React state (Set<string>) only. There is no API call to persist bookmarks and no localStorage fallback. ToggleBookmark modifies in-memory state that is lost on page reload.

summary: RE-RUN REVIEW: All three blocking issues from the original review remain unfixed. (1) Pagination count bug: get_question_count() calls still omit year filter, causing identical counts for all years. (2) Practice/exam URL id parameter: pyqId from URL is never passed to API, so navigating to a specific question still loads all filtered PYQs. (3) Mock data and unpersisted bookmarks: Subjects/topics remain hardcoded and bookmarks are client-side only with no persistence.
